precheck.sql:
SELECT NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = current_schema()
    AND table_name = 'user'
    AND column_name = 'comments'
)

postcheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = current_schema()
    AND table_name = 'user'
    AND column_name = 'comments'
)
